title: cyperus microumbellatus
intro: Cyperus microumbellatus, also known as the dwarf umbrella sedge, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the family Cyperaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with roots and rhizomes exhibiting anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and providing relief from skin irritations and wounds. In herbal preparations, the roots and rhizomes of Cyperus microumbellatus can be made into decoctions, infusions, or ointments to harness its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
